home.quote: Yoga is the journey of the self, through the self, to the self.
home.instructorsSubtitle: Our experienced and passionate instructors are here to guide you on your yoga journey, whether you're a beginner or an advanced practitioner.

instructor1.name: Gisela Novelo
instructor1.bio: With over 10 years of experience, Gis brings peace and mindfulness to every class.

instructor2.name: Brenda Quiroz
instructor2.bio: Bren specializes in building strength and mental clarity through dynamic practice.

instructor3.name: Andy Aguilera
instructor3.bio: Andy creates a welcoming space for beginners and offers transformative sound healing sessions.

home.ctaSubtitle: Join our community and discover the transformative power of yoga.

book.title: Book a Class
book.subtitle: Choose from our variety of classes throughout the week
book.cancellationText: Cancel up to 3 hours before class for a full refund. No-shows will be charged.
book.whatToBringText: We provide mats and props. Bring water and wear comfortable clothing.
book.firstTimeText: Arrive 10 minutes early to complete registration. Beginners welcome in all classes!

classes.title: Studio Classes
classes.subtitle: Discover the perfect class for your journey. From gentle restorative practices to dynamic power flows, we offer something for everyone.
classes.hathaYogaDesc: Traditional yoga practice focusing on physical postures and breathing techniques. Perfect for developing a strong foundation in yoga.
classes.hathaYogaPurpose: To create harmony between the body, mind, and spirit through sustained poses and conscious breathing.
classes.yinYogaDesc: Yin yoga is a slow-paced style where poses are held for longer periods. It targets deep connective tissues and fascia, promoting relaxation and flexibility at a profound level.
classes.yinYogaPurpose: To access deeper layers of connective tissue, increase circulation in joints, and calm the nervous system.
classes.beginnersYogaDesc: Perfect for those new to yoga, this class introduces fundamental poses, breathing techniques, and basic yoga philosophy in a supportive, non-intimidating environment.
classes.beginnersYogaPurpose: To build a strong foundation in yoga practice with proper alignment and breathing techniques.
classes.powerYogaDesc: An energetic, fitness-based approach to vinyasa-style yoga. Power yoga builds strength, flexibility, and stamina through a challenging sequence of poses.
classes.powerYogaPurpose: To build physical strength, increase cardiovascular fitness, and develop mental focus through dynamic movement.
classes.meditationDesc: A guided practice focusing on breathwork (pranayama) and meditation techniques. Learn to calm the mind, reduce stress, and cultivate inner peace.
classes.meditationPurpose: To develop mental clarity, emotional balance, and a deeper connection with the present moment.
classes.soundhealingDesc: Experience the therapeutic power of sound through singing bowls, gongs, and chimes. Deep relaxation for body and mind.
classes.soundhealingPurpose: To facilitate healing through sound vibrations, promoting physical, emotional, and spiritual well-being.
classes.ctaSubtitle: Choose a class that resonates with you and begin your transformation.

asanaLibraryDesc: Explore classic yoga poses (asanas) and learn their benefits. Each pose is a stepping stone on your journey to greater strength, flexibility, and inner peace.

pose1.name: Downward-Facing Dog Pose
pose1.description: A foundational pose that creates length throughout the entire body. The body forms an inverted V-shape, with hands and feet grounded, hips lifted high.
benefits: Energizes the body and relieves stress

pose2.name: Warrior I Pose
pose2.description: A powerful standing pose that builds strength and stability. One leg lunges forward while arms reach up to the sky, creating a strong, grounded stance.
benefits: Builds strength in legs and arms

pose3.name: Tree Pose
pose3.description: A classic balancing pose where you stand on one leg while the other foot rests on the inner thigh or calf, with hands in prayer position or reaching skyward.

pose4.name: Child's Pose
pose4.description: A gentle resting pose where you kneel and fold forward, resting your forehead on the mat with arms extended or by your sides. Perfect for relaxation.
benefits: Calms the mind and reduces stress

pose5.name: Cobra Pose
pose5.description: A gentle backbend that opens the chest and strengthens the spine. You lie on your belly and press up through your hands, lifting your chest while keeping hips grounded.

pose6.name: Lotus Pose
pose6.description: The quintessential meditation pose. Sit cross-legged with each foot placed on the opposite thigh, spine straight, and hands resting on knees.

pose7.name: Seated Forward Bend Pose
pose7.description: A core-strengthening pose where you hold your body in a straight line from head to heels, supported by your hands and toes, engaging your entire body.

pose8.name: Bridge Pose
pose8.description: A gentle backbend performed lying on your back. Lift your hips toward the ceiling while keeping shoulders and feet grounded, creating a bridge shape.

pose9.name: One-Legged King Pigeon Pose
pose9.description: A deep hip opener where one leg is folded in front while the other extends behind. This pose requires patience and releases deep-seated tension.
benefits: Releases tension in hips and lower back

tip1.head: Listen to Your Body
tip1.sub: Never force a pose. Honor your body's limits and progress at your own pace.

tip2.head: Breathe Mindfully
tip2.sub: Coordinate your breath with movement. Deep breathing enhances each pose.

tip3.head: Practice Regularly
tip3.sub: Consistency is key. Even 10 minutes daily can bring profound benefits.

contact.title: Contact Us
contact.subtitle: Visit us at our beautiful studio in Yucatán or get in touch with any questions.
contact.name: Name

footer.tagline: Find your balance, nurture your soul
